text: MCP server for monitoring Solana validator commission changes, with Claude Code alerts when stake-weighted commission shifts >2% in 24h.
why: narrow operator pain (delegators, stake pools), MCP install zero-friction, on-chain data is free via RPC

text: Cap-table diff CLI for SAFE-funded startups raising on Echo: parses term sheets and produces dilution + on-chain settlement preview for the lead.
why: Echo is new, narrow doc class, regulated wedge (Reg D), founder+lead audience addressable

text: Compliance checker that maps a DeFi protocol's smart-contract surface against the SEC DeFi Safe Harbor 2.0 carve-outs and emits a human-readable report.
why: regulated wedge, narrow buyer (protocol legal), defensible against generic LLM via curated rule corpus

text: x402 settlement receipts CLI: subscribes to a merchant wallet, parses incoming x402 payments on Solana, emits Stripe-shaped JSON for accountants.
why: agent-payments is new, accountant-tooling pain is real, narrow integration target (x402 spec)

text: Typed Python SDK over Helius DAS: codegen Pydantic models from Solana token metadata, expose typed cNFT queries to Claude Code via MCP.
why: agentic infra, narrow dev audience already on Helius, typed schema is the moat over raw JSON

text: Slashing-postmortem generator for Solana SOL stake pool operators: ingests on-chain slash events and a validator's logs, produces an LP-facing PDF.
why: narrow buyer (pool operators), regulated-LP pain real, structured on-chain inputs

text: Rebalance-as-a-CLI for Solana DeFi LPs: detects out-of-band drift across Kamino + Drift positions and proposes a single signed multi-leg tx.
why: narrow LP audience, clear wedge over existing UI flows (atomic multi-leg), x402-friendly metering

text: Yet another DEX aggregator on Ethereum, with our own routing algorithm and a 5bp fee.
why: saturated (1inch, Matcha, CoWSwap, ParaSwap, Odos), no routing wedge, MEV-constrained margins

text: AI-powered NFT generator for SMB loyalty programs: small businesses mint cNFTs as punch cards.
why: wallet UX hostile to SMB customers, no merchant pain solved, prior NFT-loyalty graveyard (Starbucks Odyssey killed)

text: Decentralized LinkedIn on a brand-new L1 chain, post-to-earn token model with anti-sybil via Worldcoin verify.
why: Lens, Farcaster, Bluesky exist; new-L1 is irrelevant to user; post-to-earn is a known anti-pattern

text: GPT-4 powered Solana memecoin trading bot, $99/mo subscription, no track record.
why: no edge, regulatory exposure (investment advice), $99/mo can't survive vs $0 Telegram bots

text: AI tokenomics designer: feeds in your project description and outputs a whitepaper plus token distribution chart, $49 one-time.
why: GPT-wrapper, one-time-use SaaS, target buyer is shrinking with token-issuance fatigue

text: Uber for spare GPUs: laptop owners rent idle 4090s to AI training jobs, settled in our new ERC-20 token.
why: Akash, io.net, Render saturated; consumer-GPU-as-supply latency unviable for training; token adds friction not value

text: DeFi yield aggregator that auto-rotates between 30 protocols on Ethereum mainnet for retail LPs, 2/20 fee.
why: Yearn, Beefy, Sommelier already; mainnet gas eats retail size; 2/20 fee structure is uncompetitive

text: AI-powered rug-pull detector Chrome extension that scans any token contract and shows a risk score, $9/mo.
why: GoPlus, De.Fi, Honeypot.is free; signal is commoditized; $9/mo retail subscription has brutal churn
